params.prompt:
Create an isolated production reference image for segmentation, not a scenic artwork.

Subject: a Bentenjima / Lake Hamana style vermilion red torii symbol tower, front-facing, full object visible, centered, with two tall cylindrical main pillars, curved top lintel, lower crossbeam, small side support posts, concrete footings, and a subtle vertical white inscription on one main pillar. Preserve the recognizable proportions of the Bentenjima red torii reference image.

Background: pure flat chroma green (#00FF00), perfectly uniform, no gradients, no sky, no mountains, no water, no reflections, no shadows, no haze, no floor, no texture. Keep a wide clean margin around the object. The torii must be sharply separated from the background with crisp edges and no green spill on the object.

Lighting: neutral studio lighting, no dramatic shadows, no backlight. Output is for SAM segmentation and alpha mask extraction.
